title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama. Chat with local LLMs from Python scripts or notebooks.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Ollama. Run Llama 3, Mistral, etc. from Node or browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama. Use local Ollama models inside LangChain chains & agents.

title: ollama-webui
summary: ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (now named Open-WebUI). Runs in Docker; supports RAG, multimodal.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama. Chat, generate, embed, and pull models from JVM apps.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama. Simple idiomatic client to run and chat with local LLMs.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-powered interactive CLI for Ollama with syntax highlighting and history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like plugin using Ollama models inside VS Code.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration for Ollama. Use local LLMs in Haystack pipelines for RAG & search.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: Function-calling, structured output, voice chat, Discord bots, etc.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) for running Ollama server containerized.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain to chat with PDFs locally.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models using slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama. Mention the bot in channels or DM to chat with Llama 3.

title: ollama-mistral
summary: Fine-tuned Mistral 7B templates optimized for function-calling via Ollama.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds AI autocomplete & summarization powered by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official Ollama JavaScript package on npm. 10k+ weekly downloads.

title: ollama PyPI
summary: Official Ollama Python package on PyPI. 50k+ monthly downloads.
